title: The Madhya Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000
full_text: The Madhya Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000 मध्‍य प्रदेश पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2000 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200028 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 2000-08-25 Act Year: 2000 Short Title: The Madhya Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000 Hindi Title: मध्‍य प्रदेश पुनर्गठन अधिनियम, 2000 Long Title: An Act to provide for the reorganisation of the existing State of Madhya Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-11-2000 Notification: 1st November, 2000, vide notification No. S.O. 827(E), dated 14th September, 2000, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Formation of Chhattisgarh State. Section 4. State of Madhya Pradesh and territorial divisions thereof. Section 5. Amendment of the First Schedule to the Constitution. Section 6. Saving powers of the State Government. Section 7. Amendment of the Fourth Schedule to the Constitution. Section 8. Speakers and Deputy Speakers. Section 16. Rules of procedure. Section 17. Delimitation of constituencies. Section 18. Power of the Election Commission to maintain Delimitation Orders up-to-date. Section 19. Amendment of the Scheduled Castes Order. Section 20. Amendment of the Scheduled Tribes Order. Section 21. High Court of Chhattisgarh. Section 22. Judges of Chhattisgarh High Court. Section 23. Jurisdiction of Chhattisgarh High Court. Section 24. Special provision relating to Bar Council and advocates. Section 25. Practice and procedure in Chhattisgarh High Court. Section 26. Custody of seal of Chhattisgarh High Court. Section 27. Form of writs and other processes. Section 28. Powers of Judges. Section 29. Procedure as to appeals to Supreme Court. Section 30. Floating loans. Section 46. Refund of taxes collected in excess. Section 47. Deposits, etc. Section 48. Provident fund. Section 49. Pensions. Section 50. Contracts. Section 51. Liability in respect of actionable wrong. Section 52. Liability as guarantor. Section 53. Items in suspense. Section 54. Residuary provision. Section 55. Apportionment of assets or liabilities by agreement. Section 56. Power of Central Government to order allocation or adjustment in certain cases. Section 57. Certain expenditure to be charged on Consolidated Fund. Section 58. Temporary provisions as to continuance of certain existing road transport permits. Section 64. Special provisions relating to retrenchment compensation in certain cases. Section 65. Special provisions as to income-tax. Section 66. Continuance of facilities in certain State institutions. Section 67. Provisions relating to All-India Services. Section 68. Provisions relating to services in Madhya Pradesh and Chhattisgarh. Section 69. Provisions relating to other services. Section 70. Provisions as to continuance of officers in same post. Section 71. Advisory Committees. Section 72. Power of Central Government to give directions. Section 73. Provisions as to State Public Service Commission. Section 74. Amendment of Act 37 of 1956. Section 78. Territorial extent of laws. Section 79. Power to adapt laws. Section 80. Power to construe laws. Section 81. Power to name authorities, etc., for exercising statutory functions. Section 82. Legal proceedings. Section 83. Transfer of pending proceedings. Section 84. Right of pleaders to practise in certain cases. Section 85. Effect of provisions of the Act inconsistent with other laws. Section 86. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
